blocks.text: Reitan Stuns Augusta as Arsenal's Title March Faces Its Next Test

Kristoffer Reitan is turning heads at Augusta — NRK calls it 'helt rått å se på'. McIlroy leads at -9 into Round 3. Saturday doubles down: Arsenal's nine-point lead tested, a Catalan derby at dusk, FIDE Candidates reaching its climax.
⛳ Masters Round 3 — McIlroy leads at -9, Reitan and Hovland chasing Norway's Augusta dream
♟️ FIDE Candidates Round 11 — World Championship challenger nearly decided, drama at maximum intensity
